description: Shared Renovate preset for Feld Hugo-on-Vercel sites. Scope is deliberately Hugo-only: auto-bumps the pinned Hugo (hugo-extended) and the hugo-common submodule, smoke-gated automerge for minor/patch. ALL other npm deps are ignored on purpose — these are static sites whose build/migration tooling (typescript, tsx, turndown, etc.) does not ship to readers; GitHub's native Dependabot security alerts cover CVEs on any runtime libs (e.g. zeroknowledge @noble/*).

packageRules.description: Hugo-only scope: ignore every npm dep except hugo-extended (build tooling, migration scripts, runtime libs). Static sites — that tail does not ship; Dependabot security alerts cover CVEs.
Hugo minor/patch: automerge once the smoke check passes
Hugo major: open the PR but require a human look (breaking-change risk)
hugo-common submodule: automerge once the smoke check passes
